error_message:

investigation_commands.hint: Verify how rrcSetupComplete is handled in the source code to identify missing NULL checks or improper assignment
Check recent gNB logs for RRC setup procedure errors or resource allocation failures related to the crash
Test network connectivity to the AMF to ensure signaling messages can be exchanged properly
